title: FactoryCraft: Create Expanded
description: A performance-optimised Minecraft modpack built around Create 6.0, featuring 50+ addons, guided quests, and deep automation. Designed for smooth gameplay, long-term worlds, and creative mechanical engineering.
body:
# **About this pack** FactoryCraft is a performance-focused Minecraft modpack built around Create 6.0, enhanced with 50+ carefully selected addons. It delivers deep mechanical automation, complex contraptions, and creative engineering without unnecessary bloat. The pack features a structured quest system to guide progression, teach Create mechanics, and provide clear goals for both newcomers and experienced players. Every mod is chosen to expand Create’s systems—power generation, logistics, factories, trains, and processing—while keeping gameplay smooth and balanced. With excellent optimisation and stability, the modpack is designed to run well on single-player worlds, making it ideal for long-term survival, technical builds, and automation projects.
What mods are included?
  • Alex's Caves
  • Applied Energistics 2 & Applied Mekanistics
  • Mekanism (Base, Generators, and Tools)
  • Tinkers' Construct & Tinkers' Levelling Addon
  • MineColonies & Structurize
  • Immersive Engineering
  • Refined Storage & Addons
  • Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
  • L_Ender’s Cataclysm & Integrated Cataclysm
  • Biomes O' Plenty
  • Thermal Series (Foundation, Expansion, Dynamics, etc.)
  • Create
  • Create: Big Cannons
  • Create: Central Kitchen
  • Create: Connected
  • Create: Confectionery
  • Create: Copycats+
  • Create: Deco
  • Create: Diesel Generators
  • Create: Enchantment Industry
  • Create: Encased
  • Create: Framed
  • Create: Goggles
  • Create: Hypertubes
  • Create: Interiors
  • Create: Jetpack
  • Create: Mechanical Companion

  • Create: New Age

  • BadOptimizations

  • Just Enough Items (JEI)
